text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 73 

PTD_TOTAL_RX_CST 

LABEL: Part D Total Prescription Costs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the gross drug cost (TOT_RX_CST_AMT) of all Part D drugs for a given year. This value 
includes the ingredient cost, dispensing fee, sales tax (if applicable), and vaccine administration fee (if 
any, 2010+ only). 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PTD_TOTAL_RX_CST 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12
